steps.title: Separate complete clauses
steps.content: The words before the blank can form a complete sentence: a photograph taken by Karimeh Abbud is featured in the exhibition. The following words begin another sentence about Abbud's image contributing to the exhibition's goal.

steps.title: Start the title phrase cleanly
steps.content: A, B, and C all leave the first complete clause and the next independent clause joined without a valid sentence boundary. A period after Abbud ends the first sentence, and Titled "Three Women," properly introduces the second. The answer is D.
